summary: Fixes the clipped header and shows detailed What's New after updates.

introduced: What's New overlay on first launch after an update — full release notes with grouped sections like the website
Nucleus menu → What's New in This Version to reopen release notes anytime
Release notes fetched from the registry when bundled notes are missing or outdated
changed: Status bar moved out of the window toolbar into a dedicated top bar so unread badges and Ready status are no longer clipped
Check for Updates button lives in the status bar beside mail and chat unread counts
fixed: Correct release notes content (no longer shows unrelated DiskWise copy)
Release notes generator uses Nucleus-specific change detection
